highlights.text: I wrote on Monday at 4pm (when we were 5160s): “My general lean is ES can try to backtest 5231, then 5248-52.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is we can fill out the 5377/87 to 5475 range more.
Short squeezes are caused by my core setup: The Failed Breakdown, and we had one at the close on Monday where ES lost the April 10th low a 5155, sold down to 5129, recovered it, and squeezed.

post_title: Three Green Days In A Row For First Time In April. Can Bulls Manage 4? April 25 Plan
